sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: rundll32 run dll from internet
sigma_analysis_results.rule_author: Joe Security

sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects malicious URL shortcut execution
sigma_analysis_results.rule_author: RussianPanda

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Suspicious WebDav Client Execution Via Rundll32.EXE
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects "svchost.exe" spawning "rundll32.exe" with command arguments like C:\windows\system32\davclnt.dll,DavSetCookie. This could be an indicator of exfiltration or use of WebDav to launch code (hosted on WebDav Server) or potentially a sign of exploitation of CVE-2023-23397
sigma_analysis_results.rule_author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)

sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects modification of autostart extensibility point (ASEP) in registry.
sigma_analysis_results.rule_author: Victor Sergeev, Daniil Yugoslavskiy, Gleb Sukhodolskiy, Timur Zinniatullin, oscd.community, Tim Shelton, frack113 (split)

sigma_analysis_results.rule_description:
Detects "svchost.exe" spawning "rundll32.exe" with command arguments like "C:\windows\system32\davclnt.dll,DavSetCookie".
This could be an indicator of exfiltration or use of WebDav to launch code (hosted on a WebDav server).
sigma_analysis_results.rule_author: Roberto Rodriguez (Cyb3rWard0g), OTR (Open Threat Research)

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Potentially Suspicious WDAC Policy File Creation
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects suspicious Windows Defender Application Control (WDAC) policy file creation from abnormal processes that could be abused by attacker to block EDR/AV components while allowing their own malicious code to run on the system.
sigma_analysis_results.rule_author: X__Junior
